hooks.command: common="$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)"; gitdir="$(git rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null)"; if git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "$common" ] && [ "$common" != "$gitdir" ]; then main="$(cd "$(dirname "$common")" && pwd)"; for f in .env; do if [ ! -L "$f" ] && [ -e "$main/$f" ]; then rm -rf "$f" && ln -s "$main/$f" "$f" && echo "Symlinked $f from $main"; fi; done; fi
if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then npx svelte-kit sync >/dev/null 2>&1; npx svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
